response.justification: Over a decade of fullstack experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages, with current AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators) directly aligned to the role. Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD), proven scaling experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, and Kubernetes/Docker exposure check nearly every required box.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matches a key requirement
Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React background well beyond 6 years
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin exposure
